title: Show payroll summary (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) below wage entries

requirements.text: Make the PayrollSummary component visible on the WageCalculator page, rendered directly below the WageEntryTable, so that the summary values (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) are always visible without any additional user action.

quotes: Soll ich als nächstes die Zusammenfassungsübersicht (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) direkt darunter sichtbar machen?

acceptanceCriteria: The PayrollSummary card is rendered on the WageCalculator page below the WageEntryTable without requiring a button click or toggle.
All four key values are displayed: Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, and Auszahlung.
The summary updates automatically when wage entries are added, edited, or deleted.
Loading skeletons are shown while the payroll summary is being fetched.
The layout is responsive and visually consistent with the existing design.

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Reuse the existing PayrollSummary component — do not create a duplicate.
Do not change the backend payroll summary calculation logic.
nonGoals: Adding new summary fields beyond those already computed by the backend.
Changing the payroll summary calculation formula.
Redesigning the existing WageEntryTable or WageEntryForm components.
